source_doc.title: A Policy on Geometric Design of Highways and Streets

rules.name: Minimum Radius for 45 mph
rules.description: Minimum radius for 45 mph design speed (Green Book Table 3-7, emax=8%)
rules.error_message: Radius too small for 45 mph (minimum 560 ft)

rules.name: Minimum Radius for 50 mph
rules.description: Minimum radius for 50 mph design speed (Green Book Table 3-7, emax=8%)
rules.error_message: Radius too small for 50 mph (minimum 710 ft)

rules.name: Minimum Radius for 55 mph
rules.description: Minimum radius for 55 mph design speed (Green Book Table 3-7, emax=8%)
rules.error_message: Radius too small for 55 mph (minimum 835 ft)

rules.name: Minimum Radius for 60 mph
rules.description: Minimum radius for 60 mph design speed (Green Book Table 3-7, emax=8%)
rules.error_message: Radius too small for 60 mph (minimum 1000 ft)

rules.name: Minimum Radius for 65 mph
rules.description: Minimum radius for 65 mph design speed (Green Book Table 3-7, emax=8%)
rules.error_message: Radius too small for 65 mph (minimum 1150 ft)

rules.name: Minimum Radius for 70 mph
rules.description: Minimum radius for 70 mph design speed (Green Book Table 3-7, emax=8%)
rules.error_message: Radius too small for 70 mph (minimum 1310 ft)

rules.name: Maximum Superelevation - Rural
rules.description: Maximum superelevation is 12% for high-speed rural roads
rules.error_message: Superelevation exceeds maximum 12%

rules.name: Maximum Superelevation - Snow/Ice
rules.description: Maximum superelevation is 8% for areas with snow/ice
rules.error_message: Superelevation > 8% may be unsafe in snow/ice conditions

rules.name: Minimum K for Crest Curve 60 mph
rules.description: Minimum K value for crest vertical curve at 60 mph (Green Book Table 3-34)
rules.error_message: K value too small for 60 mph crest curve (minimum 151 ft/%)

rules.name: Minimum K for Sag Curve 60 mph
rules.description: Minimum K value for sag vertical curve at 60 mph (Green Book Table 3-35)
rules.error_message: K value too small for 60 mph sag curve (minimum 136 ft/%)

rules.name: Minimum K for Crest Curve 45 mph
rules.description: Minimum K value for crest vertical curve at 45 mph (Green Book Table 3-34)
rules.error_message: K value too small for 45 mph crest curve (minimum 61 ft/%)

rules.name: Minimum K for Sag Curve 45 mph
rules.description: Minimum K value for sag vertical curve at 45 mph (Green Book Table 3-35)
rules.error_message: K value too small for 45 mph sag curve (minimum 79 ft/%)

rules.name: Grade Range
rules.description: Grade typically limited to +/-10%
rules.error_message: Grade exceeds typical maximum (+/-10%)

rules.name: Grade Range - Out
rules.description: Grade typically limited to +/-10%
rules.error_message: Grade exceeds typical maximum (+/-10%)

rules.name: Valid Vertical Curve Type
rules.description: Vertical curve type must be crest or sag
rules.error_message: Invalid vertical curve type

rules.name: Crest Curve Grade Check
rules.description: Crest curve requires grade_in > grade_out
rules.error_message: Crest curve specified but grades indicate sag

rules.name: Sag Curve Grade Check
rules.description: Sag curve requires grade_in < grade_out
rules.error_message: Sag curve specified but grades indicate crest

rules.name: SSD Range
rules.description: Stopping sight distance must be within design range
rules.error_message: SSD outside valid range (80-1500 ft)

rules.name: Minimum SSD for 60 mph
rules.description: Minimum stopping sight distance for 60 mph (Green Book Table 3-1)
rules.error_message: SSD too short for 60 mph (minimum 570 ft)

rules.name: Minimum SSD for 45 mph
rules.description: Minimum stopping sight distance for 45 mph (Green Book Table 3-1)
rules.error_message: SSD too short for 45 mph (minimum 360 ft)

rules.name: Horizontal Class Range
rules.description: Horizontal class must be 0-5
rules.error_message: Horizontal class must be 0-5

rules.name: Radius vs Horizontal Class - Class 0
rules.description: Radius >= 2550 ft corresponds to class 0 (tangent)
rules.error_message: Radius >= 2550 ft should be class 0

rules.name: Side Friction Factor Range
rules.description: Side friction factor by design speed (Green Book Table 3-6)
rules.error_message: Side friction factor outside valid range

rules.name: Design Speed Range
rules.description: Design speed typically ranges from 15-80 mph
rules.error_message: Design speed outside typical range (15-80 mph)

rules.name: Positive Radius
rules.description: Radius must be positive
rules.error_message: Radius must be positive

rules.name: K Value Positive
rules.description: K value must be positive
rules.error_message: K value must be positive
